title: dysoxylum quadrangulatum
intro: Dysoxylum quadrangulatum, also known as the Philippine Dysoxylum, is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dysoxylum quadrangulatum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
